zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Chetwynd於1372年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾英格斯特時，她的父親William De Cheywynd II18歲，母親Aline De St. Paul19歲。她於1397年8月24日與Sir William Purefoy在英國萊希斯特斯爾德雷頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Chetwynd于1372年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾英格斯特时，她的父亲William De Cheywynd II18岁，母亲Aline De St. Paul19岁。她于1397年8月24日与Sir William Purefoy在英国萊希斯特斯爾德雷頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Chetwynd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Chatwin
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Staffordshire): habitational name from a place in Shropshire called Chetwynd, from the Old English personal name Ceatta + Old English (ge)wind ‘winding ascent’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Chetwynd was born in 1372, in Ingestre, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William De Cheywynd II, was 18 and her mother, Aline De St. Paul, was 19. She married Sir William Purefoy on 24 August 1397, in Drayton, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Chetwynd est née en 1372, à Ingestre, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William De Cheywynd II, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Aline De St. Paul, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Purefoy le 24 août 1397, à Drayton, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Chetwynd 1372 in Ingestre, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William De Cheywynd II 18 und ihre Mutter Aline De St. Paul 19. Sie hat am 24. August 1397 in Drayton, Leicestershire, England Sir William Purefoy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Chetwynd è nata il nel 1372 nel Ingestre, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William De Cheywynd II, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Aline De St. Paul, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Purefoy il 24 agosto 1397, nel Drayton, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Chetwyndが1372年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアインジェストアで生まれた時，父William De Cheywynd IIは18歳，母Aline De St. Paulは19歳であった。1397年8月24日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアドレイトンでSir William Purefoyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Chetwynd(이)가 1372년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 잉스트르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William De Cheywynd II(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aline De St. Paul(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1397년 8월 24일 영국 레이스스터실르 드라이턴에서 Sir William Purefoy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Chetwynd nasceu em 1372, em Ingestre, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William De Cheywynd II, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Aline De St. Paul, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Purefoy em 24 de agosto de 1397, em Drayton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Chetwynd родилась в 1372 г. в местности ингестр, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William De Cheywynd II было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Aline De St. Paul, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Purefoy 24 августа 1397 г. в местности дреитон, лисестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Chetwynd nació en 1372, en Ingestre, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William De Cheywynd II, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Aline De St. Paul, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Sir William Purefoy el 24 de agosto de 1397, en Drayton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
